judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong margins and analyst support, though trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 4.6%; next earnings date is 2026-05-05.
positives: Revenue growth 90.1% YoY and analyst estimates of 236.6% for the current quarter and 300.7% for the current fiscal year indicate explosive growth.
Operating margin of 21.8% and profit margin of 17.7% demonstrate strong profitability.
Return on equity at 22.8% shows effective use of shareholder investments.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 24 analysts with a mean target price of $1104.68 suggests significant upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 168.56 and Forward P/E of 52.52 indicate a very high valuation.
Price/Book of 80.18 and Price/Sales of 29.72 further emphasize the premium valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 111.44 suggests significant leverage.
Free cash flow of $93.35M appears low relative to the company's market capitalization and debt.

news.paragraph: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (LITE) is highlighted as one of America's greatest opportunities, with its stock experiencing an incredible run. This positive press suggests strong investor sentiment and potential for continued upward momentum. Traders should note the upcoming earnings report on May 5th, which could serve as a catalyst for further price action.

headlines.title: America's Greatest Opportunities: JDS Uniphase's Incredible Run
